appraisal_events.evidence: « Il parlait aussi des mercredis comme d'une occupation aussi importante et aussi inéluctable... renonçait aux douceurs du mercredi non pour un ouvrier frappé d'une attaque, mais pour le coryza d'un ministre... “tu vois bien que j'ai mon gilet blanc.” »
appraisal_events.explanation: Cottard is shown as treating the Verdurins’ Wednesdays like an obligatory summons, prioritizing prestige over need and even refusing to treat his bleeding cook because he is dressed for the salon; this exposes his social subservience and poor judgment.

status_effects.explanation: He appears diminished as overly deferential to the salon’s demands and insensitive in his professional priorities.
